name: ot-ics-sa-portfolio
description: Realistic, fact-checked SA work products for the OT/ICS cybersecurity domain, built around a **USACE Columbia River Hydropower** federal engagement scenario.

scripts.test:whiteboard: npm run typecheck:whiteboard && npm run build:whiteboard
scripts.audit:whiteboard: npm run test:whiteboard && npm run audit:whiteboard:scenario && node scripts/audit-whiteboard.mjs
